description: Follow-up in an existing thread — draft must use conversation history, not just the latest message

chunks.content: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery. To start a return, visit your order page in the account dashboard and click 'Start a return'. You'll be emailed a prepaid shipping label.

inputs.customerMessage: Ok where do I do that?

conversationHistory.content: Hi, I bought a sweater 10 days ago and it doesn't fit. Can I return it?
Hi Sarah, yes — your order is well within our 30-day return window. You can start a return from your account dashboard.

mustDo: Understand that the customer is asking where to start the return (based on prior message), not treating 'Ok where do I do that?' as ambiguous
Point to the order page in the account dashboard and the 'Start a return' button
Mention that a prepaid shipping label will be emailed
mustAvoid: Ask the customer to clarify what they're referring to
Repeat the 30-day policy info already given in the previous agent message
Invent a different return flow (customer support ticket, email, etc.) not described in the KB
rubric.toneNote: Friendly and concise — the customer wants a quick answer
